name: Three-Minute Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the raisins and let stand until ready to use.
2. Combine all other ingredients in a bowl while the raisins soak.
3. Stir the raisins into the mixture.
4. Bake at 350°F to 400°F in a hot oven for approximately three minutes.
